name: jobescape-qa
description: Automated QA for jobescape — upsells, onboardings, unsub flow, and ad-hoc feature checks. Drives the Playwright-based executor at ~/jobescape-auto-qa: registers a fresh user via funnel, walks the chosen surface (upsell / onboarding / unsub / arbitrary feature URL), captures screenshots + DOM + analytics events + console + network errors, and presents a dashboard-style summary in chat.
